description_long: This humanoid robot features a rounded, metallic body with a blue-gray, slightly weathered finish and prominent rivets along its joints and torso. Its head is a smooth, featureless dome with two small, black circular eyes, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The robot's arms and legs are constructed from cylindrical segments connected by spherical joints, allowing for a wide range of motion. Its hands are mechanical claws, currently holding a neatly wrapped gift box with a red ribbon, adding a playful and interactive element. The robot's feet are broad and flat, providing stability, and its overall build is robust yet stylized, reminiscent of retro-futuristic designs. The surface shows some signs of wear, suggesting it is built for practical use in urban environments.
description: A blue-gray, retro-styled humanoid robot with a rounded body, riveted joints, and mechanical claws holding a gift box. Its smooth dome head and sturdy limbs give it a friendly, functional appearance.
description_view_0: The robot is seen from the left side, showing its rounded torso, articulated arm, and mechanical claw holding a gift box.
description_view_1: The back view reveals the curved, riveted shell of the torso and the symmetrical placement of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: The right side view highlights the robot's arm and claw gripping the gift box, with the head slightly tilted forward.
description_view_3: The front view displays the robot's face with two small eyes, both arms extended forward to present the gift box.
attribute_pose: The robot is standing upright with both arms extended forward, holding a gift box in its mechanical claws. Its legs are slightly apart for balance, and the head is angled slightly downward toward the gift.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated metallic panels and riveted joints as part of its structure. The only decorative element is the gift box it holds.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a smooth, rounded dome with two small, black circular eyes and no visible mouth, nose, or expressive features.
attribute_limb_articulation: The robot has articulated arms and legs with visible ball-and-socket joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, and mechanical claws for hands. The limbs appear to have a wide range of motion and are constructed from rigid segments.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two small, black circular eyes on the head likely serve as visual sensors; no other sensors are visible.
